title: A Blended Family's First Christmas Together
title_zh: 重組家庭的第一個聖誕節

all.en: This was our first Christmas as a blended family, and nobody quite knew what to expect.
all.zh: 這是我們組成繼親家庭以後的第一個聖誕節，誰也不太清楚會發生什麼事。

all.en: My mother had remarried a kind man named Steven in late October after dating for two years.
all.zh: 我媽媽在交往兩年後，於十月底和一位名叫史蒂芬的好心男士再婚了。

all.en: Steven brought with him two teenage children, a quiet daughter and a sarcastic younger son.
all.zh: 史蒂芬帶來了兩個正值青春期的孩子，一個沉默的女兒和一個愛挖苦人的小兒子。

all.en: I was twenty-three and had moved out years ago, but I came home for the long holiday week.
all.zh: 我二十三歲，已經搬出去好幾年了，但我趁著長假回家過節。

all.en: The first awkward moment came when we discovered our families had very different Christmas traditions.
all.zh: 第一個尷尬的時刻出現在我們發現兩家有著截然不同的聖誕節傳統時。

all.en: My family opened presents on Christmas morning, but Steven's family always opened them on Christmas Eve.
all.zh: 我們家是聖誕節早上拆禮物，但史蒂芬家總是在聖誕夜就拆。

all.en: Steven's daughter, Hannah, suggested a compromise that nobody had thought of during the heated discussion.
all.zh: 史蒂芬的女兒漢娜在那場激烈的討論中提出了一個沒人想到的折衷辦法。

all.en: Why not open one small gift on Christmas Eve and save the bigger ones for morning?
all.zh: 為什麼不在聖誕夜拆一個小禮物，把大禮物留到早上呢？

all.en: It was such a simple idea that all four of us laughed at how stubborn we had been.
all.zh: 這個點子如此簡單，搞得我們四個都笑自己怎麼會這麼固執。

all.en: The next problem was the Christmas dinner menu, which created its own kitchen drama on Tuesday.
all.zh: 下一個問題是聖誕大餐的菜單，星期二在廚房裡上演了一場小風暴。

all.en: My mother insisted on roast duck because that was what her own mother had cooked every year.
all.zh: 我媽媽堅持要做烤鴨，因為她的母親每年都做這道菜。

all.en: Steven, however, came from a family that always served a turkey with cranberry sauce and stuffing.
all.zh: 然而史蒂芬來自一個一向吃火雞配蔓越莓醬和填料的家庭。

all.en: His sarcastic son, Tyler, said he would eat neither and would survive on snacks instead.
all.zh: 他那個愛挖苦人的兒子泰勒說兩樣他都不吃，他要靠零食過活。

all.en: I volunteered to cook both, even though I had never roasted a turkey in my entire life.
all.zh: 我自告奮勇兩道都做，雖然我這輩子從來沒烤過火雞。

all.en: Hannah said she would help me, and together we watched three different YouTube tutorials that night.
all.zh: 漢娜說她會幫我，那晚我們倆一起看了三支不同的 YouTube 教學影片。

all.en: Cooking side by side in the kitchen turned out to be a wonderful way to get to know her.
all.zh: 在廚房裡並肩做菜，意外地成了認識她最棒的方式。

all.en: She told me about her late mother, who had loved baking cookies shaped like tiny snowflakes.
all.zh: 她跟我說起她過世的媽媽，那位媽媽從前最愛烤雪花形狀的小餅乾。

all.en: I shared stories about my late father, who used to sing carols loudly and slightly off-key.
all.zh: 我則分享了關於我過世父親的故事，他從前總是大聲又有點走調地唱聖誕歌。

all.en: Somewhere between rolling cookie dough and basting the turkey, we became more than just stepsisters.
all.zh: 在揉餅乾麵團和為火雞抹油之間，我們不再只是繼姊妹的關係。

all.en: Tyler was a tougher case because he spent most of the afternoon in his room playing video games.
all.zh: 泰勒比較難搞，因為他一整個下午幾乎都待在房間裡打電動。

all.en: I tried to start a conversation, but every question I asked received a one-word answer.
all.zh: 我試著找話題，但我問的每個問題他都只用一個字回答。

all.en: Finally, I sat on the floor beside him and asked if he could teach me his favorite game.
all.zh: 最後我乾脆坐到他旁邊的地板上，請他教我玩他最愛的遊戲。

all.en: His eyes lit up, and for the next hour I was thoroughly defeated in a racing game.
all.zh: 他眼睛一亮，接下來的一個小時我在一款賽車遊戲裡被徹底打敗。

all.en: By the end, he was laughing and explaining strategies he had spent months perfecting on his own.
all.zh: 到最後，他一邊大笑一邊解釋他自己花了好幾個月才練熟的攻略。

all.en: On Christmas Eve, the five of us gathered around the small tree to open one gift each.
all.zh: 聖誕夜那天，我們五個人圍著那棵小樹，每個人各拆一個禮物。

all.en: Mom opened a handmade photo album from Steven, full of pictures from their two years together.
all.zh: 媽媽拆開的是史蒂芬手作的相簿，裡面滿是他們在一起兩年的照片。

all.en: She cried, and Hannah quietly handed her a tissue without making it into a big moment.
all.zh: 她哭了，漢娜悄悄遞了一張面紙給她，沒有把它變成什麼大場面。

all.en: Tyler opened a vintage video game cartridge from me and actually hugged me for the first time.
all.zh: 泰勒拆開的是我送他的一張復古遊戲卡帶，他還第一次抱了我一下。

all.en: On Christmas morning, the smell of roast duck and turkey mixed in the kitchen like a small miracle.
all.zh: 聖誕節早上，烤鴨和火雞的香味在廚房裡交織，宛如一個小小的奇蹟。

all.en: We squeezed around our dining table that was definitely not designed for five tall adults.
all.zh: 我們擠在那張顯然不是為五個高大成年人設計的餐桌邊。

all.en: Steven asked if we could go around the table and say one thing we were grateful for.
all.zh: 史蒂芬提議我們輪流分享一件自己感謝的事。

all.en: When my turn came, I said I was grateful for unexpected gifts that did not come in boxes.
all.zh: 輪到我時，我說我感謝那些不裝在盒子裡的意外禮物。

all.en: Hannah reached under the table and squeezed my hand without saying a single word in reply.
all.zh: 漢娜在桌子底下握了一下我的手，一句話也沒有回我。

all.en: Tyler joked that he was grateful for someone finally being bad enough at racing to make him look good.
all.zh: 泰勒開玩笑說他很感謝終於有個人賽車爛到能襯托他很厲害。

all.en: As I drove back to the city that evening, I realized our family had quietly grown a little larger.
all.zh: 那天傍晚開車回城裡的路上，我發現我們的家庭已經悄悄變得大了一些。

all.en: Over the following weeks, Hannah and I exchanged long text messages almost every other evening.
all.zh: 接下來的幾個星期裡，漢娜和我幾乎隔晚就互傳長長的訊息。

all.en: She started a small online cookbook project with me, collecting our two families' favorite recipes.
all.zh: 她和我開始合作一個小型線上食譜計畫，收集我們兩家最喜愛的食譜。

all.en: Tyler messaged me out of the blue, asking for help choosing a present for his father's birthday.
all.zh: 泰勒突然傳訊息給我，問我幫他挑一份給他爸爸的生日禮物。

all.en: We picked out a leather notebook together, and he insisted on signing the card from both of us.
all.zh: 我們一起選了一本皮革筆記本，他堅持卡片上要署上我們兩個人的名字。

all.en: Mom called to say Steven cried softly when he read that warm card on his birthday morning.
all.zh: 媽媽打電話說史蒂芬生日早上讀那張溫暖的卡片時，悄悄地流了眼淚。

all.en: For Lunar New Year, the whole blended family squeezed into Steven's living room for dumplings.
all.zh: 農曆春節時，整個繼親家庭擠進史蒂芬的客廳一起包水餃。

all.en: Tyler proudly demonstrated three different folding techniques he had picked up from a video tutorial.
all.zh: 泰勒驕傲地示範了三種他從教學影片中學來的包餃子手法。

all.en: Hannah and I prepared a sweet eight-treasure rice pudding that filled the apartment with sweet steam.
all.zh: 漢娜和我做了一道甜八寶飯，公寓裡瀰漫著甜甜的蒸氣。

all.en: We took a slightly blurry family photo afterward and made it our group chat profile picture.
all.zh: 之後我們拍了一張稍微有些模糊的全家福，並把它設為群組聊天的大頭照。

all.en: Looking at that photo now, I cannot even imagine the holidays without these four extra people.
all.zh: 現在看著那張照片，我已經無法想像過節時少了這四個人會是什麼模樣。

all.en: The following summer, our blended family planned a week-long road trip down the east coast together.
all.zh: 隔年夏天，我們的繼親家庭一起規劃了沿著東海岸的一週公路旅行。

all.en: Steven rented a large van and personally mapped out scenic stops he had researched for many weeks.
all.zh: 史蒂芬租了一台大型廂型車，親自規劃了他研究了好幾週的風景停留點。

all.en: Hannah and I shared a window seat and made a playlist mixing both of our favorite music styles.
all.zh: 漢娜和我共享一個靠窗座位，做了一份結合我們兩人喜愛音樂風格的播放清單。

all.en: Tyler discovered he loved hiking when our family climbed a small coastal trail near Hualien.
all.zh: 我們全家在花蓮附近爬一條小型海岸步道時，泰勒發現自己很愛健行。

all.en: Mom and Steven held hands at every scenic overlook and let the four of us tease them gently.
all.zh: 媽媽和史蒂芬在每個風景眺望點都手牽著手，任由我們四個輕輕地取笑他們。

all.en: We stayed at a small seaside guesthouse where the owner cooked breakfast for us every morning.
all.zh: 我們住在一間小型海邊民宿，老闆每天早上都為我們做早餐。

all.en: On the third night, we built a small bonfire and roasted sweet potatoes wrapped in foil.
all.zh: 第三天晚上，我們生了一個小營火，烤了包著鋁箔紙的地瓜。

all.en: Tyler told ghost stories that made everyone laugh more than they actually frightened anyone in the family.
all.zh: 泰勒講了一些鬼故事，但更多時候是讓全家人發笑，而不是真的嚇到誰。

all.en: Hannah quietly thanked me for being patient with her family through their first awkward holiday season.
all.zh: 漢娜悄悄地感謝我，在她家人經歷第一個尷尬節慶時對他們保持耐心。

all.en: Driving home, I realized that our blended family had finally simply become our family without any prefix.
all.zh: 開車回家的路上，我發現我們的繼親家庭終於變成了沒有任何前綴的家庭。

all.en: Hannah and I co-authored our cookbook and self-published it as a Christmas gift to the whole family.
all.zh: 漢娜和我合著了那本食譜書，自費出版作為送給全家人的聖誕禮物。

all.en: Tyler designed the cover artwork using digital tools he had mastered during long pandemic afternoons.
all.zh: 泰勒用他在漫長疫情下午精通的數位工具設計了書的封面。

all.en: Steven cried quietly when he opened his copy and saw photos from every gathering since they had married.
all.zh: 史蒂芬打開他那本時悄悄落淚，看到自從他們結婚以來每一場聚會的照片。

all.en: Mom suggested we mail copies to extended family members, who all wrote back with their own recipes.
all.zh: 媽媽建議我們把書寄給遠房親戚，結果他們都回信附上自己家的食譜。

all.en: We began compiling a second volume immediately, this time celebrating all corners of our extended family.
all.zh: 我們立刻開始編纂第二輯，這次要慶祝我們大家族裡每個角落的故事。

all.en: Tyler got accepted into a graphic design program and chose a university just an hour from his father.
all.zh: 泰勒考取了一個平面設計學程，並選了一所離他爸爸只有一小時路程的大學。

all.en: Hannah took a gap year and volunteered at a community center teaching baking to elderly residents.
all.zh: 漢娜休了一個間隔年，到一個社區中心當志工，教年長居民烘焙。

all.en: I moved closer to home to be near them all and finally adopted a small rescue dog named Cookie.
all.zh: 我搬到離他們近一點的地方，終於領養了一隻名叫餅乾的小型救援犬。

all.en: Cookie became everyone's favorite addition, especially Tyler's, who walked her every weekend without fail.
all.zh: 餅乾成了大家最喜歡的新成員，特別是泰勒，他每個週末必定會帶她出去散步。

all.en: Our Christmas tradition now includes one new gift exchange among siblings, and the laughter has only grown.
all.zh: 我們現在的聖誕節傳統還包括手足之間的新禮物交換，笑聲也越來越多。

all.en: We hung two sets of stockings, unsure whose traditions should come first.
all.zh: 我們掛上兩套聖誕襪，不確定該先依誰家的傳統。

all.en: Steven taught us to bake gingerbread, a custom from his own childhood.
all.zh: Steven 教我們烤薑餅，那是他童年時的習俗。

all.en: His sarcastic son surprised everyone by carefully wrapping each tiny gift.
all.zh: 他那愛挖苦人的兒子竟細心地包好每一份小禮物，讓大家驚訝。

all.en: At dinner, an awkward silence fell before anyone dared to start talking.
all.zh: 晚餐時，在有人敢開口前，先是一陣尷尬的沉默。

all.en: Hannah broke the ice with a joke that made my mother laugh out loud.
all.zh: Hannah 用一個笑話打破僵局，逗得我媽媽放聲大笑。

all.en: We decorated the tree together, blending ornaments from both old homes.
all.zh: 我們一起裝飾聖誕樹，把兩個舊家的飾品融合在一起。

all.en: By dessert, the children were already planning next year's celebration.
all.zh: 吃到甜點時，孩子們已經在計劃明年的慶祝活動了。

all.en: Steven raised a glass and thanked us all for making him feel welcome.
all.zh: Steven 舉起酒杯，感謝我們所有人讓他感到備受歡迎。

all.en: We realized that family is built slowly, through small, shared moments.
all.zh: 我們體會到，家是透過一個個共享的小小時刻慢慢建立起來的。

all.en: That night, the whole living room glowed warmly with new and old joy.
all.zh: 那一夜，整間客廳因新舊交織的喜悅而溫暖地閃耀著。
